name: config_inter_slr_muxing
short_description: This command configures the properties of Inter SLR Muxing flow.
full_help:
config_inter_slr_muxing

Description: 
This command configures the properties of Inter SLR Muxing flow.

Syntax: 
config_inter_slr_muxing  [-insertion_mode <arg>] [-min_ratio <arg>]
                         [-max_ratio <arg>] [-area_constraint <arg>]
                         [-max_nets <arg>] [-isdut_mode <arg>]
                         [-control_logic_sharing <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name                      Description
  -------------------------------------
  [-insertion_mode]         Enable the inter-SLR muxing flow
                            Default: none
  [-min_ratio]              Minimum ratio for the inter-SLR circuitry
                            Default: 2
  [-max_ratio]              Maximum ratio for the inter-SLR circuitry
                            Default: 16
  [-area_constraint]        Area constraint around the SLR crossing
                            Default: 1
  [-max_nets]               Maximum number of nets to be muxed
                            Default: 10000000
  [-isdut_mode]             Inheritance of property IS_DUT for the inserted 
                            logic
                            Default: 2
  [-control_logic_sharing]  Maximum number of IPs sharing the same control 
                            logic
                            Default: 0
  [-quiet]                  Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]                Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Tools, Place
